title: John Moffet - Canada.ca
content:
## Associate Deputy Minister
John Moffet was appointed Associate Deputy Minister of Environment and Climate Change (ECCC), effective July 22, 2024.
John has worked as a corporate lawyer, political assistant (Attorney General of Ontario), and environmental policy consultant, and for the past 18 years has been a proud member of ECCC. Most recently, he was the Assistant Deputy Minister of the Environmental Protection Branch.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
